overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic desert city environment. The player moves along a neon-lit promenade past a large statue structure, interacts with NPCs including a woman exhaling purple smoke, and continues toward an underpass beneath a rocky overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian promenade with neon-lit statue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade toward a group of pedestrians in the distance

entered.detail: massive dark structure with glowing green neon lines running vertically
large purple advertising screen with 'Glamour' text and product display
cluster of tall saguaro cacti in a planter bed
elevated pedestrian bridge crossing above the street
large circular futuristic stadium with scaffolding and neon signs in the background
sleek red sports car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit futuristic promenade with a massive green neon-lit statue structure dominating the right side. The player walks past a purple advertising billboard and tall cacti on the left, approaching an overpass walkway ahead. A red sports car is parked on the right, and the distant stadium structure looms in the background.

events.description: passing a woman who exhales visible purple smoke, creating a temporary particle effect

agents.ego_description: moving through a crowd of pedestrians, passing close to a woman who is smoking

notable_agents.action: woman in a black and gold dress standing and smoking, exhaling purple smoke as the player passes by

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a moderate crowd of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. A notable interaction occurs with a woman in a black and gold dress who exhales purple smoke as the player passes close by. The green neon statue structure remains prominent on the right, now much closer, while the initial billboard and cacti disappear from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with parked vehicles approaching underpass

events.description: camera briefly looks down at lower level stairs with people sitting below

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past parked military vehicles, briefly looking down at a sunken area with people

entered.detail: large red military-style six-wheeled truck parked on the street
concrete stairs leading down to a sunken plaza area
dark tunnel entrance beneath the rocky overpass ahead

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the open asphalt street, passing a large red military truck parked on the left. The camera briefly pans down to reveal a lower level with stairs and people sitting in the shade. The segment ends as the player approaches a dark underpass entrance beneath a rocky overpass, with the earlier neon statue and stadium now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunlit futuristic promenade that gradually transitions into a shadowed urban underpass. It begins by moving past a purple advertising billboard and tall cacti, with a massive green neon-lit statue and a distant stadium dominating the bright skyline. As the camera pushes forward through a crowd of pedestrians, the scene shifts to a close encounter with a woman in a black and gold dress who exhales a cloud of purple smoke. The perspective then continues along the open asphalt street past a parked red military truck, briefly panning down toward a shaded lower level filled with people. Finally, the bright desert light fades as the camera moves away from the neon structures and enters the dark mouth of an underpass beneath a rocky overpass.
